subject: perf(builder): extract type arrays to constants, scope PageTabs selector
body:
- FieldPropertiesPanel: extract 6 inline array literals to module-level
  constants (PLACEHOLDER_EXCLUDED, REQUIRED_EXCLUDED, OPTIONS_TYPES,
  LAYOUT_TYPES, TEXT_VALIDATION_TYPES, CONDITIONS_EXCLUDED). Eliminates
  array recreation and GC pressure on every render during field editing.
- PageTabs: narrow Zustand selector from full `s.definition` to
  `s.definition.pages`. Prevents re-renders when field content changes
  on any page — PageTabs only needs page titles and field counts.

Tags: performance, re-renders, zustand
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ui-polish
Semver: patch
